p57DecisionRationale: 1. Axis B 2-round mandatory catch-up from P52 is COMPLETE (P53 + P54).
2. Two design-only phases (P55, P56) intervened with zero Axis A src/ additions.
3. P57 would be the 1st consecutive Axis A round — far below the 3-consecutive limit.
5. P57 scope is tightly constrained to TypeScript contract types only (no adapter implementations, no DB).
6. P57 is Axis A v1 (new generation) — NOT continuing Axis A v0 which was explicitly capped at P52.
7. CEO Decision P4 explicitly authorized Axis A v1 real-data integration design, which P56 completed. P57 is the first implementation step of that design.

p57AllowedScope.name: Axis A v1 Source Adapter Contract Stub
p57AllowedScope.description: Define TypeScript types and interfaces for the v1 source adapter layer. Pure type definitions — no adapter implementations, no DB access, no Prisma imports, no ResearchSnapshotInputBuilder. One contract file + one test file.

allowedFileRationale.RealDataSnapshotInputContract.ts: Single consolidated types file defining: SourceInputFact<T>, SourceAdapterContract<TInput, TFact>, QuoteAdapterInput, RegimeAdapterInput, MonthlyRevenueAdapterInput, PitSafetyStatus enum, SourceInputFactAuditFlags. No implementation logic.
allowedFileRationale.p57_axis_a_v1_real_data_snapshot_contrac: Contract shape tests: type-level assertions, forbidden-field scan, governance flag constants, runtime-shape tests for factory helpers if any.
allowedFileRationale.p57_axis_a_v1_source_adapter_contract_re: P57 implementation and CI report documenting the contract design, tests, and coverage.

forbidden: DB access or Prisma import in any P57 file
requiredGuardrails: All forbidden fields (20) absent from all exported types
testRequirements: T57.1: SourceInputFact<T> shape — sourceType, asOfDate, pitGateField, pitGateValue, pitGateStatus, data; no forbidden fields
T57.2: SourceAdapterContract interface shape — adapt() returns SourceInputFact<TFact> | null
T57.3: QuoteAdapterInput — allowed fields present; forbidden fields absent
T57.4: RegimeAdapterInput — allowed fields present; forbidden fields absent
T57.5: MonthlyRevenueAdapterInput — allowed fields including releaseDate, releaseDateSource, releaseDateConfidence; forbidden fields absent
T57.6: PitSafetyStatus / PitGateStatus constants — PIT_SAFE, LOW_CONFIDENCE_PIT_INFERRED, PIT_BLOCKED present
T57.7: SourceInputFactAuditFlags — LOW_CONFIDENCE_PIT_INFERRED flag type definition correct
T57.8: Contract file has zero Prisma imports
T57.9: Contract file has zero DB/network/filesystem imports
T57.10: Forbidden-fields scan — all 20 forbidden field names absent from any exported type key
T57.11: Governance constants — entersAlphaScore=false, paperOnly=true, dryRunOnly=true, notInvestmentAdvice=true present as literal constants
T57.12: QuoteAdapterInput does not include targetPrice, ROI, returnPct, or any derived field
T57.13: MonthlyRevenueAdapterInput does not include yoyGrowth-as-forecast or revenue-as-ROI derived shapes
T57.14: RegimeAdapterInput does not include forecast, prediction, signal, or recommendation fields
T57.15: SourceInputFact<T>.data never contains alphaScore or score
T57.16: All exported type shapes are JSON-serializable (no Symbol, Function, class instance types)

postP57AxisBalance.assessmentAfterP57: After P57, the ratio of 13:6 = 2.17:1 is within acceptable bounds. The next phase (P58 Axis A v1 adapter implementations) would bring ratio to 14:6 = 2.33:1 and 2 consecutive Axis A rounds — still within the 3-consecutive limit. However, P59 (ResearchSnapshotInputBuilder, also Axis A) would reach 3 consecutive Axis A. An Axis B assessment should occur at P59 gate before committing to another Axis A round.
